_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The PlexiQoL has a wide measurement range with 97.4% of respondents obtaining valid scores on the measure.
details: Wide measurement range with 97.4% of respondents obtaining valid scores, minimal floor and ceiling effects
